title: Otyacraft Engine Renewed
description: A library mod for Iam Music Player Renewed. Fork of Otyacraft Engine with updated libraries and support for newer mod versions.
body:
# Otyacraft Engine Renewed

**Otyacraft Engine Renewed** is a library mod mainly used by [Iam Music Player Renewed](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iammusicplayer-renewed).  
It's a fork of the original [Otyacraft Engine](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/otyacraft-engine).

## 📦 What is this mod?

This is a library mod required for [IMPR](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iammusicplayer-renewed).  
It doesn’t affect gameplay and only provides things like item tags and other backend stuff.

## ❓ FAQ

**Why use Otyacraft Engine Renewed?**  
The original mod uses outdated libraries that aren’t compatible with newer versions of mods like IMPR (3.22.0-alpha.8+).
